---
name: Feature request
about: Propose new functionality or improvements
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

A clear description of the problem or limitation this feature would address.
e.g. "I always have to manually re-enter credentials when..."

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like and how it would work from a user perspective.

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you have considered and why this solution is preferred.

## Additional Context

Any mockups, references, or related issues that support this proposal.
